title: Forgetful Copper Golems
description: Copper Golems now remember where they last placed items, making organization faster and more efficient!
body: This mod makes Copper Golems no longer forgetful and remember where they last placed items, overall making organization faster and more efficient! Please note due to prevent performance issues the golems will check every 2 seconds. This means if your copper chest is not at least 6-8 blocks away from a regular chest, it will ignore the mod for the first 2 seconds and proceed to check normally. After the 2 seconds, it will find the chest immediately. As per community request, I've provided a video proving my point that the mod is legitimate and works. The video was recorded on 1.21.10. https://youtu.be/EmlBuHvjwRw ## NEED A SERVER?
